Name: RavenDB - Smuggler - Moving Data between File Systems
Description: To move data directly between two instances (or different file systems in the same instance) using the between option introduced in Smuggler version 3.

Parameters.Name: ravenSmugglerPath
Parameters.Label: Raven Smuggler Path
Parameters.HelpText:
Full path to the Smuggler EXE.

For example: **C:\RavenDB\Smuggler\Raven.Smuggler.exe**

Parameters.Name: sourceFileSystemURL
Parameters.Label: Source File System URL
Parameters.HelpText:
The URL of the Raven File System, where the **Source File System** is located.

For example: **http://localhost:8080/**

Parameters.Name: sourceFileSystemName
Parameters.Label: Name of the Source File System
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the **Source File System** in Raven.

Parameters.Name: sourceFileSystemApiKey
Parameters.Label: Api Key for the Source File System
Parameters.HelpText:
API Key needed to access the **Source File System**.

If key is not provided, anonymous authentication will be used. 

For more information: http://ravendb.net/docs/article-page/3.0/csharp/studio/accessing-studio

Parameters.Name: destinationFileSystemURL
Parameters.Label: Destination File System URL
Parameters.HelpText:
The URL for the Raven File System where the **Destination File System** is located.

For example: **http://localhost:8080/**

Parameters.Name: destinationFileSystemName
Parameters.Label: Name of the Destination File System
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the **Destination File System** in Raven.

Parameters.Name: destinationFileSystemAPIKey
Parameters.Label: API Key for the Destination File System
Parameters.HelpText:
API Key needed to access the **Destination File System**.

If key is not provided, anonymous authentication will be used.

For more information: http://ravendb.net/docs/article-page/3.0/csharp/studio/accessing-studio

Parameters.Name: timeout
Parameters.Label: Timeout
Parameters.HelpText: The timeout (in milliseconds) to use for requests.
